TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Alex_Blackwell, title = Alex_Blackwell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alex_Blackwell} }

S.FORM: == Alex Blackwell == u siwkay niza Alex Blackwell, tatama, nalecuhan 6 bulad 27 demiad, 1970 a mihcan, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Robert Alexander Blackwell is a retired American professional basketball player, who had a brief stint with the Los Angeles Lakers of the NBA. A 6'6", 250 lb forward born in Toms River, New Jersey, he attended Monmouth College in West Long Branch, New Jersey.During the 1992‚Äì93 NBA season, Blackwell was used sparingly by the Lakers, playing 27 games, averaging 1.3 points and 0.9 rebounds per game. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == ar~…æ…ô* br~…æa ¶kw…ôr~…ær~…æ == u siwkaj niza ar~…æ…ô* br~…æa ¶kw…ôr~…ær~…æ, tatama, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶an, miunduaj, mimar~…æi i amir~…æika nba. u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika *ob…ôrt ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr br~…æa ¶kw…ôr~…ær~…æ is a r…ôtir…ôd am…ôri ¶an prof…ôssionar~…æ bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ pr~…æaj…ôr, wƒßo ƒßad a bri…ôf stint witƒß tƒß…ô r~…æos a≈ã…ôr~…æ…ôs r~…æak…ôrs of tƒß…ô nba. a * î~ °*", *** r~…æb forward born in toms *i*…ôr, n…ôw *…ôrs…ô, ƒß…ô att…ônd…ôd monmoutƒß ¶or~…ær~…æ…ôg…ô in w…ôst r~…æo≈ã bran ¶ƒß, n…ôw *…ôrs…ô.duri≈ã tƒß…ô ******* nba s…ôason, br~…æa ¶kw…ôr~…ær~…æ was us…ôd spari≈ãr~…æj bj tƒß…ô r~…æak…ôrs, pr~…æaji≈ã ** gam…ôs, a*…ôragi≈ã *.* points and *.* r…ôbounds p…ôr gam…ô. kakuniza kar~…æunasur~…æitan-sur~…æu
S.FORM: == Alex Blackwell == u siwkay niza Alex Blackwell, tatama, nalecuhan 6 bulad 27 demiad, 1970 a mihcan, miunduay, mimali i Amilika NBA. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Robert Alexander Blackwell is a retired American professional basketball player, who had a brief stint with the Los Angeles Lakers of the NBA. A 6'6", 250 lb forward born in Toms River, New Jersey, he attended Monmouth College in West Long Branch, New Jersey.During the 1992‚Äì93 NBA season, Blackwell was used sparingly by the Lakers, playing 27 games, averaging 1.3 points and 0.9 rebounds per game. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
